name: ai-news-briefing
description: Comprehensive AI news tracking, deep research agents, automated Notion/Teams/Slack publishing, and a 5-axis LLM-as-judge quality eval harness with offline dashboard, for Gemini CLI.

settings.name: Notion API Token
settings.description: Token for the Notion MCP server to create/update briefing pages.

settings.name: Obsidian Vault Path
settings.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault for publishing.

settings.name: Teams Webhook
settings.description: Optional webhook URL for Microsoft Teams notifications.

settings.name: Slack Webhook
settings.description: Optional webhook URL for Slack notifications.
